case_title: LIEU, RICHARD VS PHOLSITH, MASTER PORNPRASERT

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LIEU, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT PHOLSITH, MASTER PORNPRASERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2000 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-28-2000 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-14-2000 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PHOLSITH, MASTER PORNPRASERT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIEU, RICHARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PHOLSITH, MASTER PORNPRASERT PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLFT RICHARD LIEU REQUEST TO CORRECT JUDGMENT, FILED. FEES PAID. SUSPENCE DATE OCT. 2, 2000.
PLFT MOTION TO VACATE OR CORRECT JUDGMENT DENIED BY COMMISSIONER. NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
PLTFF FILING LETTER PLUS ATTACHMENTS FOR COMM. SUE KAPLAN AS REFERRED BY THE COMMISSION ON JUDICIAL PERFORMANCE.
PLTFF FILING LETTER TO HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY: PRESIDING JUDGE-AS REFERRED BY NORA C/O SUE KAP- LAN(SEE LETTER FROM SMALL CLAIMS).
